_comment_feature_commits: Which commits count for trend metrics. mode 'exclude' counts everything EXCEPT subjects matching exclude_regex (chore/docs/style/revert/merge — non-substantive). mode 'regex' (subject_regex) is the inverse allowlist. mode 'all' counts every commit.
_comment_make: The model must provide these targets (see PROMPT.md). The harness calls them; you normally do not edit this. Override only if a run's Makefile deviates.
_comment_meta: Report paths/formats are read from the target repo's eval.meta.json, which the model writes. These are fallbacks if eval.meta.json is missing a field.
_comment_layout: Run scripts from the REPO ROOT, passing this file: python eval/scripts/commit_size.py eval/eval.config.json. repo_path is the model's code root (repo root). meta_file is read from repo root.
